summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Ventura B2B SaaS MVP - both backend APIs and frontend functionality working correctly

minor_issues.issue: Returns 405 instead of proper CORS headers on OPTIONS request
minor_issues.impact: Does not affect functionality as CORS works for actual requests

minor_issues.issue: Some invalid routes return 405/401 instead of 404
minor_issues.impact: Does not affect functionality - proper error handling

minor_improvements.issue: 1 out of 2 images missing alt text

passed_tests: Contact form submission (/api/contact) - stores in database successfully
Authentication protection - all protected endpoints return 401 without auth
Share endpoints - return 404 for non-existent tokens
Landing page loads with hero section, V logo, services cards, about section
Contact form submission works with success feedback
Navigation links work (Services, About, Contact anchors)
Responsive design works on desktop, tablet, and mobile
Get Valued button redirects to Emergent Auth correctly

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (all core functionality working, minor accessibility improvement needed)
